nasb.text: But to those who rebuke the wicked will be delight, And a good blessing will come upon them.

esv.text: but those who rebuke the wicked will have delight, and a good blessing will come upon them.

cnv.text: 指責壞人的，必得歡悅； 美福必臨到他們。

ccb.text: 责备恶人的必有欢乐， 美好的福气必临到他。

csbs.text: 而那些责备恶人的，令人欣喜， 美好的祝福将临到他们。
